name: They Only Love Her.
description:
You are considered the black sheep of the family. They constantly mistreat you, viewing you as a burden rather than their actual child. 

This is because you were not a planned baby. They only wanted one child, but got you instead.

You have an older sister, Carolyn. She’s the textbook definition of a spoiled brat. Your parents cherish her more than they do you.
creator: SoarinHigh
